question: Comment structurer une app modulaire avec systeme de plugins/registry ?

principles.text: Registry interne VS Code-inspired (PAS micro-frontends pour single team). Module definition declarative + lazy loading React.lazy + communication par events types. Shell fournit extension points, modules les peuplent. Chaque module declare ses contributions (routes, panels, commandes) dans un manifest statique.

sources.name: VS Code Extension API — Contribution Points
sources.quote: Extensions declare contributions in package.json, activated lazily

sources.name: Martin Fowler — Micro Frontends
sources.quote: Micro frontends add complexity — justify only for multiple autonomous teams

sources.name: Module Federation Documentation
sources.quote: Runtime module loading for independent deployment

sources.name: VS Code Extensibility Principles
sources.quote: Stability through extension host isolation and declarative contributions
